title: Communauté de communes de la Terre des Deux Caps
summary: The communauté de communes de la Terre des Deux Caps is located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was established on 1 January 2002. Its seat is Marquise. Its area is 183.3 km2, and its population was 22,197 in 2018.
text:
The communauté de communes de la Terre des Deux Caps is located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was established on 1 January 2002. Its seat is Marquise. Its area is 183.3 km2, and its population was 22,197 in 2018.
